name: General Business License
description: A general business license is required by most cities and counties before you can legally operate any type of business.

name: Cleaning Business
description: A cleaning business license covers residential and commercial cleaning services, including janitorial and maid services.

name: Food Truck
description: A food truck license allows you to operate a mobile food vending business, including permits for food safety and vehicle operation.

name: Contractor
description: A contractor license is required for general contractors, builders, and construction professionals.

name: Electrician
description: An electrician license is required to perform electrical work including wiring, installation, and repair services.

name: Plumber
description: A plumber license is required for plumbing installation, repair, and maintenance work.

name: HVAC Technician
description: An HVAC license is required to install, maintain, and repair heating, ventilation, and air conditioning systems.

name: Real Estate Agent
description: A real estate license is required to represent buyers and sellers in property transactions.

name: Cosmetologist
description: A cosmetology license is required to provide hair, nail, and skin care services.

name: Massage Therapist
description: A massage therapy license is required to provide therapeutic massage services to clients.

name: Daycare / Childcare
description: A childcare license is required to operate a daycare, nursery, or other child care facility.

name: Liquor / Alcohol
description: A liquor license is required to sell, serve, or manufacture alcoholic beverages.

name: Restaurant
description: A restaurant license covers food service establishments open to the public, including cafes and diners.

name: Landscaping
description: A landscaping license may be required for lawn care, landscape design, and related outdoor services.

name: Auto Repair
description: An auto repair license is required to operate a vehicle repair shop, garage, or mechanic service.
